title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deployment and management of databases at scale, including SQL and NoSQL best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, taught by David J. Malan.
